zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thomas Swaffer於大約1661年出生在英國爾牛頓時，他的父親Josias Swaffer38歲，母親Elizabeth Andra Morris24歲。他於1694年8月4日與Mary Elizabeth Caldwell在美國賓夕法尼亞州切斯特雷利 堂史普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1720年3月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特瑟 普洛維登斯 堂史普享年60歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Thomas Swaffer于大约1661年出生在英国爾牛頓时，他的父亲Josias Swaffer38岁，母亲Elizabeth Andra Morris24岁。他于1694年8月4日与Mary Elizabeth Caldwell在美国宾夕法尼亚州切斯特雷利 堂史普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1720年3月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特瑟 普洛維登斯 堂史普享年60岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Swaffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swatfield Bridge in Willesborough (Kent). The placename derives from Old English swæth ‘track, pathway’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1682: Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Chester, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Chester, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When William Thomas Swaffer was born about 1661, in Newton, Cheshire, England, his father, Josias Swaffer, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Andra Morris, was 24. He married Mary Elizabeth Caldwell on 4 August 1694, in Ridley Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 13 March 1720, in Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Thomas Swaffer est né environ 1661, à Newton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Josias Swaffer, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Andra Morris, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth Caldwell le 4 août 1694, à Ridley Township, Chester, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1720, à Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Thomas Swaffer um 1661 in Newton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Josias Swaffer 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Andra Morris 24. Er hat am 4. August 1694 in Ridley Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Elizabeth Caldwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 13. März 1720 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America und wurde in Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Thomas Swaffer è nato il circa 1661 nel Newton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Josias Swaffer, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Andra Morris, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth Caldwell il 4 agosto 1694, nel Ridley Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1720, nel Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thomas Swafferが約1661年にイギリスチェシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父Josias Swafferは38歳，母Elizabeth Andra Morrisは24歳であった。1694年8月4日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州チェスターリドリー トウンシュイップでMary Elizabeth Caldwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1720年3月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターネスエル プロヴィデンス トウンシュイップで60歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Ridley Township, Chester, Pennsylvania,: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 리들리 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: William Thomas Swaffer(이)가 대략 1661년 영국 체실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Josias Swaffer(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Andra Morris(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1694년 8월 4일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 리들리 타운시프에서 Mary Elizabeth Caldwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1720년 3월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 네터 프로비데스 타운시프에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Thomas Swaffer nasceu aproximadamente 1661, em Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Josias Swaffer, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Andra Morris, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth Caldwell em 4 de agosto de 1694, em Ridley Township, Chester, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1720, em Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thomas Swaffer родился около 1661 г. в местности нютон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Josias Swaffer было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Andra Morris, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth Caldwell 4 августа 1694 г. в местности ридли тоуншип, честир, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 13 марта 1720 г. в местности нетир провиденс тоуншип, честир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Thomas Swaffer nació aproximadamente 1661, en Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Josias Swaffer, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Andra Morris, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mary Elizabeth Caldwell el 4 de agosto de 1694, en Ridley Township, Chester, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1720, en Nether Providence Township, Chester, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Chester, Pensilvania, British Colonial America.
